target.profile_note: fresh RCH fmd linalg profile after pass184 ranked qr1024 at 26.804..26.872..27.145 ms behind GEMM, pinv, and LU; no open ready perf beads existed

source.lever: widen QR_REFLECTOR_COL_TILE from 8 to 16 in apply_real_householder_columns

benchmarks.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-pass185-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/ --quick --noplot
benchmarks.candidate_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-uh7ar-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --quick --noplot

isomorphism: Each affected column still accumulates dot products over v rows in ascending row_offset order
Each affected column still multiplies its dot by tau exactly once before updates
Each affected column still applies row updates in ascending row_offset order
Only the number of adjacent columns handled per row scan changes

tests.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-uh7ar-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib qr -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-uh7ar-check cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-uh7ar-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

tests.result: nonzero from pre-existing broad linalg.rs inventory; no unsafe blocks and fmt/clippy/check/test-build sections clean

decision.result: Keep. Same-worker fmd intervals are non-overlapping and the lever is a one-line bit-preserving QR layout change.
decision.next_route: Reprofile after landing. If GEMM remains top, route exact-order GEMM to another structural cache primitive or file the required FP tolerance contract for recursive/communication-avoiding GEMM; otherwise attack the next ranked LU/SVD primitive.
